aesthetic_direction: The design system aims for a modern, clean, and trustworthy aesthetic. It leverages ample white space, clear typography, and subtle animations to create a user-friendly experience. The focus is on providing accurate information and efficient tools, reflecting the AI-powered nature of the platform. The design avoids unnecessary ornamentation, prioritizing functionality and ease of use. We use the 'Professional Trust' color palette to convey authority and reliability.

user_flows.name: New User Trial Signup to Activation
user_flows.description: A prospective user discovers RealEstate AI, signs up for a free trial, and completes onboarding to manage their first property.

steps.action: User lands on homepage, reads value proposition
User explores interactive demo to see features in action
User calculates pricing for their portfolio size
User clicks 'Start Free Trial — No Credit Card Required'
User adds first property with guided wizard
User imports tenants via CSV or manual entry
User sets up rent collection and connects bank
User sends first tenant invite
User views AI-generated property dashboard

user_flows.name: Tenant Screening and Lease Signing
user_flows.description: A landlord receives a tenant application, runs AI-powered screening, approves the tenant, and executes a lease.

steps.action: Lead submits application through listing
Landlord reviews lead details and history
AI Smart Score evaluates the applicant
Landlord schedules property viewing with approved applicant
Landlord generates lease from template and sends for e-signature
Tenant signs lease electronically
Tenant is added to property with move-in date

user_flows.name: Predictive Maintenance Resolution
user_flows.description: AI predicts a maintenance issue, landlord is alerted, schedules repair, and resolves the issue proactively.

steps.action: AI flags predicted HVAC failure with 85% confidence
Landlord reviews property details and maintenance history
Landlord schedules preventive maintenance appointment
Automated message notifies tenant of upcoming maintenance
Vendor completes repair, landlord marks resolved
AI updates prediction model with resolution data

user_flows.name: Starter to Growth Tier Upgrade
user_flows.description: A free-tier user hits the 5-unit limit, explores upgrade options, and converts to a paid plan.

steps.action: User attempts to add 6th property, sees upgrade prompt
User explores pricing for their growing portfolio
User calculates ROI of upgrading to Growth tier
User compares Growth vs Professional features
User selects Growth plan with annual billing (20% off)
User completes Stripe payment
User adds additional properties with unlocked features

feature_specs.name: AI-Powered Insights for Property Valuation and Market Analysis
feature_specs.description: AI engine that analyzes market data, comparable sales, and rental trends to provide accurate property valuations and actionable market intelligence. Includes confidence scoring, trend predictions, and automated report generation.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Dashboard-style interface with interactive charts, AI confidence indicators, and drill-down capability. Uses progressive disclosure to show summary insights first with detailed analysis available on demand.

feature_specs.name: Predictive Maintenance Scheduling
feature_specs.description: Machine learning model that analyzes maintenance history, property age, equipment lifecycles, and seasonal patterns to predict potential issues before they become emergencies. Automatically generates preventive maintenance schedules.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Timeline-based visualization with urgency color coding (green/yellow/red). Prediction cards show confidence percentage, estimated cost, and recommended action date. Integrates with scheduling system for one-click appointment creation.

feature_specs.name: Automated Tenant Communication
feature_specs.description: Multi-channel communication automation system that handles routine tenant interactions including rent reminders, maintenance updates, lease renewal notices, and welcome messages. Supports email, SMS, and in-app messaging with customizable templates.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Template builder with drag-and-drop blocks, trigger configuration panel, and conversation preview. Communication log shows full history per tenant with channel indicators. Automation rules use a visual flow builder.

feature_specs.name: Smart Scheduling and Booking
feature_specs.description: AI-optimized scheduling system that automatically finds optimal time slots for property viewings, inspections, and maintenance based on landlord availability, tenant preferences, travel distances, and property priorities. Includes public booking links for self-service scheduling.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Calendar interface with AI-suggested time slots highlighted. Smart conflict detection with alternative suggestions. Public booking widget that can be embedded on listing pages. Mobile-optimized touch interactions for on-the-go scheduling.

feature_specs.name: Tenant Screening
feature_specs.description: Comprehensive tenant screening service with AI Smart Score that evaluates credit history, background checks, rental history, income verification, and references. Provides a composite risk score with detailed breakdown and fair housing compliance.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Application review interface with AI Smart Score prominently displayed as a circular gauge. Detailed breakdown in expandable sections. Compliance checklist sidebar. Approve/deny workflow with automated notifications.

feature_specs.name: Online Rent Collection
feature_specs.description: Automated rent collection system with Stripe integration supporting ACH, credit/debit cards, and recurring payments. Features automatic late fee calculation, payment reminders, receipt generation, and financial reconciliation.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Clean payment dashboard showing collection status per property with color-coded indicators (paid, pending, late, overdue). Tenant-facing payment portal with saved payment methods and autopay setup. Real-time payment notifications.

feature_specs.name: Document Management
feature_specs.description: Centralized document storage and management system with lease template builder, e-signature workflows, version control, and automated document generation. Supports all property-related documents including leases, inspection reports, and compliance certificates.
feature_specs.ui_approach: File manager interface with folder tree navigation, drag-and-drop upload, and document preview. Template editor with variable fields for lease generation. E-signature flow with signing order and status tracking. Full-text search across all documents.

feature_specs.name: CRM
feature_specs.description: Unified customer relationship management system for managing all contacts including tenants, prospects, owners, and vendors. Features contact profiles with full interaction history, segmentation, automated follow-ups, and communication tracking.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Contact list with search, filters, and custom views. Detail view shows full contact profile with activity timeline, communication log, associated properties, and documents. Kanban view for lead pipeline management.

feature_specs.name: Accounting and Financial Reporting
feature_specs.description: Comprehensive accounting module with income/expense tracking, automated categorization, financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow), tax report generation, and owner statements. Integrates with rent collection for automatic entries.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Financial dashboard with summary cards (total revenue, expenses, NOI) and trend charts. Transaction list with category filters and search. Report builder with customizable date ranges and property grouping. Export to PDF/CSV/Excel.

shadows.style: Subtle, layered soft shadows to add depth and separation.

layout.hero_style: Large heroic typography (72px+) with custom property photography, creative taglines, and subtle parallax. Split-screen layout with value proposition on left and interactive property preview or dashboard demo on right.
layout.card_style: Rounded corners, subtle shadow, clean typography, and consistent spacing.
layout.navigation_style: Clean top navigation supporting user journeys rather than simple task lists. Collapsible sidebar for dashboard views with drag-and-dock customization. Logical page hierarchy with breadcrumbs for deep property management workflows.

asset_prompts.prompt: A clean and modern hero image for a real estate management platform. The scene depicts a bright, airy office space with a diverse team collaborating around a large touchscreen displaying property data and analytics dashboards. The color palette is dominated by teal (#008080) and white, with orange (#FF6B35) accents on UI elements and data highlights. The mood is collaborative, efficient, and trustworthy. Natural light streams through floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city skyline with residential buildings. The composition is balanced and professional, conveying the platform's ability to streamline property management with AI-powered intelligence. The viewer should feel confident and empowered to manage their real estate portfolio effectively.

A professional Open Graph image for RealEstate AI, a property management platform. Clean white background with the RealEstate AI logo prominently centered. Below the logo, the tagline 'Property Management That Thinks Ahead' in Manrope font. A subtle teal (#008080) gradient bar at the bottom. On the right side, a simplified illustration of a property dashboard showing charts and AI insights with teal and orange (#FF6B35) accent colors. The overall feel is modern, trustworthy, and tech-forward. Text is large and legible at small sizes for social media preview thumbnails.

A beautifully photographed modern residential property exterior for use in a property listing card. The image shows a well-maintained two-story home with a manicured lawn, clean architectural lines, and warm lighting suggesting a sunset golden hour. The style is professional real estate photography with enhanced colors and clarity. The composition leaves space at the bottom for an overlay showing property details (price, bedrooms, square footage) in the platform's design language with a teal (#008080) accent bar and white text on a semi-transparent dark overlay. The mood is aspirational yet attainable, targeting small-to-medium landlords.

A polished product screenshot of the RealEstate AI dashboard interface. The screen shows a clean, modern dashboard with a collapsible teal (#008080) sidebar navigation on the left. The main content area displays a property portfolio overview with summary cards (total units, occupancy rate, monthly revenue, pending maintenance) at the top. Below, an AI insights panel with a teal gradient header shows predictive maintenance alerts and rent optimization suggestions. Charts display rental income trends and occupancy rates. The design uses the Professional Trust palette: white background, teal primary, orange (#FF6B35) for action buttons and alerts. Typography is clean Inter/Manrope. The interface looks data-rich yet uncluttered, demonstrating the platform's AI-native intelligence.

asset_prompts.type: feature illustration for AI capabilities section
asset_prompts.prompt: A modern, minimal illustration representing AI-powered property management insights. The composition features a stylized property building in the center with flowing data streams connecting to surrounding icons: a brain symbol for AI predictions, a wrench for maintenance forecasting, a chart trending upward for market analysis, a shield for tenant screening, and a calendar for smart scheduling. The color palette uses teal (#008080) as the primary color with orange (#FF6B35) highlights on key elements. The background is clean white with subtle geometric patterns. The style is flat design with slight gradients, professional yet approachable. The illustration conveys intelligence, automation, and modern technology working seamlessly for property managers.

mobile_design.app_icon_description: A rounded square (iOS superellipse) app icon with a teal (#008080) gradient background transitioning from darker teal at the top-left to lighter teal (#339999) at the bottom-right. In the center, a minimalist white house/building silhouette with a subtle AI circuit pattern integrated into the roof line, symbolizing intelligent property management. A small orange (#FF6B35) dot sits at the top-right corner of the building, representing AI activity and smart insights. The design is clean, modern, and instantly recognizable at small sizes. The icon conveys trust, technology, and real estate in a single glance.
mobile_design.splash_screen_description: A clean white background with the RealEstate AI logo centered vertically. The logo consists of a teal (#008080) building icon with the AI circuit motif, positioned above the wordmark 'RealEstate AI' in Manrope Bold. Below the wordmark, a subtle loading animation — three teal dots pulsing sequentially — indicates the app is loading. A very subtle teal gradient wash appears at the bottom 20% of the screen. The overall feel is minimal, professional, and fast, setting the tone for an efficient property management experience.

outdoor_contrast.note: Increase text contrast ratio to minimum 7:1 for outdoor readability. Use bolder font weights (600+) for body text. Add subtle text shadows on overlaid content.

gesture_patterns: swipe to navigate between property cards
pull to refresh property listings and dashboard data
long press for quick actions menu on property cards
swipe left on list items to reveal delete/archive actions
pinch to zoom on maps and property photos
double tap to like/favorite a property

mobile_asset_prompts.prompt: A mobile app icon for RealEstate AI property management platform. Rounded square shape with a teal (#008080) gradient background from top-left dark (#006666) to bottom-right light (#339999). Center features a minimalist white building silhouette with clean geometric lines and a subtle circuit pattern in the roofline suggesting AI intelligence. A small orange (#FF6B35) glowing dot in the upper-right of the building represents active AI monitoring. The design is simple, bold, and recognizable at 29px. No text. Professional and modern aesthetic matching iOS/Android design guidelines.

A mobile splash screen for RealEstate AI app. Clean white (#FFFFFF) background. Centered vertically: the RealEstate AI logo — a teal (#008080) building icon with circuit motif above the wordmark 'RealEstate AI' in Manrope Bold dark text (#1A1A2E). Below the wordmark at 60% vertical position, three small teal dots in a horizontal row suggesting a loading animation. The bottom 15% has a very subtle teal gradient wash fading from transparent to 5% opacity teal. Minimal, professional, and fast-feeling. No other decorative elements.

An App Store screenshot for RealEstate AI showing the main dashboard on an iPhone. The screenshot has a teal (#008080) background frame with white text at the top reading 'AI-Powered Property Management' in Manrope Bold. Below, a realistic iPhone mockup displays the app dashboard: portfolio summary cards (8 units, 95% occupancy, $12,400 revenue), an AI insights notification about predicted maintenance, and a mini chart showing rental income trends. The app uses the Professional Trust palette — white background, teal accents, orange (#FF6B35) action buttons. The screenshot demonstrates the app's clean interface and AI intelligence at a glance.

An App Store screenshot for RealEstate AI showing the AI Tenant Screening feature on an iPhone. Teal (#008080) background frame with white text at the top reading 'Smart Tenant Screening' in Manrope Bold. The iPhone mockup shows the screening results screen: a large circular AI Smart Score gauge (showing 87/100 in teal), breakdown categories (credit, background, income, references) with progress bars, and an approve/deny action bar at the bottom with teal approve and red deny buttons. The design is clean, data-rich, and professional using the Professional Trust palette.
